title: Switching to Polygon sub-mode
capture_instructions: Reclassify Points tool is active. The sub-panel shows both Drag-Select and Polygon buttons. The Polygon button is now highlighted/active (just clicked or about to be clicked). The overlay text in the 3D viewport has updated to 'Click to place vertices · click first vertex to close'. No polygon vertices have been placed yet.
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, Polygon sub-mode just activated, no vertices placed yet

annotations.label: Overlay: 'Click to place vertices · click first vertex to close'
